title: Extra Select Crunchy Duos Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 120 biscuits)
features: Tasty, crunchy biscuits your dog will love, perfect as a treat or reward.
Suitable for all breeds and ideal for training or occasional indulgence.
Comes in a resealable 1L bucket for freshness and convenience.
Complements your dog’s normal daily feeding routine.
Approx. 120 biscuits per bucket, offering great value and lasting enjoyment.
